notes: Exceptional breadth and depth across all dimensions — problem is framed as operational and regulatory risk rather than a build task, personas are named with role context (though cost-per-persona is implicit rather than explicit), MVP is well-bounded with explicit deferrals, out-of-scope items carry substantive reasons, assumptions surface genuine uncertainties with risk-if-wrong framing (especially R1 on normalisation governance), success metrics are anchored with baseline and targets, and hard constraints (RBNZ deadline, audit trail, human sign-off, normalisation disclosure) are all present and sourced.
